results.title: CVX: Chevron Corp - Stock Price, Quote and News - CNBC
CVX Stock Quote Price and Forecast | CNN
Chevron (CVX) CEO Highlights Need for Further Reforms in Venezuela's Oil Sector
Is Chevron (CVX) Offering Value After A 10.8% Monthly Pullback?
Suelopetrol says it has not been Informed of Chevron's (CVX) Expansion at Venezuela Joint Venture
Chevron braces for Q1 earnings and revenue decline

summary: Chevron nearing $1B Singapore asset sale to ENEOS (50% stake in Singapore Refining Co). Venezuela: Chevron reached PDVSA agreements in Orinoco Belt, raised stake to 49% from 35.8%; CEO calls for further oil policy reforms. Q1 2026 earnings due May 1 with analysts expecting YoY decline. Stock down ~10.8% over trailing month, trading $190.59 on April 29.
